description_long: This muffin features a generous swirl of pale pink frosting, smoothly piped in a spiral pattern that peaks at the top. The frosting has a glossy, creamy appearance, suggesting a soft and luscious texture. The muffin base is light golden-brown and appears moist, with a slightly domed top visible beneath the frosting. It is encased in a metallic, silver-colored wrapper with a fluted edge, giving it a modern and elegant presentation. No visible toppings or decorative elements are present aside from the frosting. The object is shown isolated, with no visible background or placement surface.
description: A muffin with glossy pink swirled frosting in a metallic silver fluted wrapper, with no visible toppings or decorations.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen with the frosting peak slightly leaning left, showing the fluted metallic wrapper and a smooth swirl of pink frosting.
description_view_1: This view centers the frosting peak, highlighting the even spiral and the symmetrical fluting of the silver wrapper.
description_view_2: The frosting peak is angled slightly to the right, with the wrapper's reflective surface catching more light on this side.
description_view_3: The swirl of frosting is most prominent, with the wrapper's fluting appearing more rounded and the frosting's texture clearly visible.
